# Issue #9: Purchase order service

## Description
Implement purchase order service for ordering materials from suppliers.

## Tasks
- [x] Create PO with supplier, product, quantity
- [x] Calculate price with bulk discounts
- [x] Track PO status (pending, partial, delivered)
- [x] Implement partial delivery logic (~5-10% chance)
- [x] Deliver PO and update inventory
- [x] Cancel PO functionality
- [x] Add API endpoints for all operations

## Acceptance Criteria
- Bulk discounts applied automatically
- Partial deliveries occur realistically
- Inventory updated on delivery
- All statuses tracked correctly

## Phase
Phase 2 - Core Simulation
